message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="Task #2 done, CI green, need 9/9 consensus">
Task #2 (CSS gaps) committed, pushed, and CI GREEN (2b5789a). 

ALL REVIEWERS: Please review and send consent or concerns. We need 9/9 consensus.

Changes: static/css/main.css — 7 items fixed:
1. .nav-logout — margin-inline-start: auto (right-aligned in header)
2. .nav-logout__button — styled as muted text link
3. .todo-add__group — spacing below input group
4. .todo-add__submit — fixed class name mismatch (was .todo-add__button)
5. .todo-add__error + :empty — danger color, small font, collapses when empty
6. .auth-form__message:empty — collapses empty error container
7. .auth-form__actions + .auth-form__cancel — flexbox layout, cancel as text-link

This addresses all of Steve Schoger's flagged CSS gaps.
</teammate-message>

Author: John Wilger <john@johnwilger.com>
Date:   Sun Feb 8 14:25:24 2026 -0800

    Add missing CSS styles for nav-logout, todo-add errors, auth-form actions
    
    Addresses CSS gaps flagged during polish review:
    
    - .nav-logout / .nav-logout__button: position logout form right-aligned
      in header nav, style button as muted text link (not primary button)
    - .todo-add__group: spacing for the add-todo label+input group
    - .todo-add__submit: fix class mismatch (was .todo-add__button in CSS
      but .todo-add__submit in template)
    - .todo-add__error: danger color, small font, :empty collapse
    - .auth-form__message:empty: collapse empty error containers to remove gap
    - .auth-form__actions: flexbox row for save/cancel button pair
    - .auth-form__cancel: secondary text-link styling for cancel action
    
    Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

 1 file changed, 61 insertions(+), 1 deletion(-)

content.text: Thorough review complete. Let me verify one thing -- that the class name in the template matches the new CSS selector.
Good -- the class name is now consistent between the template and CSS. No leftover `.todo-add__button` references anywhere.

input.content:
**Review of 2b5789a -- CSS gaps fix**

**I consent.**

This is a CSS-only change (no Rust, no templates, no tests needed). My review from a production-readiness and consistency perspective:

1. **Class name mismatch fixed**: `.todo-add__button` renamed to `.todo-add__submit` -- I verified the template uses `todo-add__submit` and no references to the old name remain anywhere in the codebase. Good catch.

2. **All values reference design tokens**: Every added rule uses `var(--color-*)`, `var(--space-*)`, `var(--font-size-*)`, `var(--font-normal)` -- no hardcoded hex or pixel values. This follows our CSS conventions correctly.

3. **`:empty` collapse pattern is correct**: Both `.auth-form__message:empty` and `.todo-add__error:empty` use `display: none` to collapse when empty. This works well with the always-in-DOM pattern for `aria-describedby` -- the error element remains in the DOM for screen readers but takes no visual space when empty.

4. **Nav logout positioning**: `margin-inline-start: auto` is the right approach for pushing it to the end of a flex container, and using logical properties (`inline-start`) supports future RTL. The button reset styles (background: none, border: none) are thorough.

5. **Layer placement**: All new rules are within the existing `components` layer, which is correct per our cascade layer convention.

No concerns. Clean, focused fix addressing all flagged gaps.
input.summary: Consent on 2b5789a - CSS gaps fix reviewed

1. **Class name mismatch fixed**: `.todo-add__button` renamed to `.todo-add__submit` -- I verified the template uses `todo-add__submit` and no references to the old name remain anywhere in the codebase. Good catch.
